Ringer artifact color tokens

Reference snapshot for ARTIFACT_BASE_CSS in ringer.py. tests/test_design_reference.py asserts the shipped CSS matches these values exactly — update both together when the palette intentionally changes.

Dark (default)

--ground#0b0e14
--surface#141a26
--ink#e9eef7
--muted#8fa0b6
--hairline22% alpha
--accent#35d0ff
--pass#45d17e
--fail#ff5f6b
--waiting#6f7c92
--quote-bg8% alpha

Light

--ground#f2f5f9
--surface#ffffff
--ink#17202e
--muted#5a6a7e
--hairline28% alpha
--accent#007fb0
--pass#178a4c
--fail#cc3340
--waiting#7d8ba0
--quote-bg7% alpha
